<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void skip_bytes_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::size_t bytes) {
    buffer.skip(bytes);
}

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    MessageHeader header;
    buffer.read(&header, sizeof(header));
    buffer.skip(header.body_length);
    return header;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    std::size_t written = 0;
    while (value > 0x7f) {
        const std::uint8_t byte = (value & 0x7f) | 0x80;
        writer.put(endian::le(byte));
        value >>= 7;
        ++written;
    }
    const std::uint8_t byte = value & 0x7f;
    writer.put(endian::le(byte));
    return ++written;
}

T decode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    T value = 0;

    do {

        reader.get(&byte, 1);
        value |= (static_cast<T>(byte & 0x7f) << shift);

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <algorithm>

std::size_t write_multiple_chunks(const std::vector<std::vector<uint8_t>>& chunks) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    
    for (const auto& chunk : chunks) {
        // Check available space before each write
        std::size_t available_space = adaptor.free();
        
        // Write the chunk data
        adaptor.write(chunk.data(), chunk.size());
    }
    
    return adaptor.size();
}

std::vector<uint8_t> read_partial_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, std::size_t chunk_size) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    
    while (adaptor.size() > 0) {
        std::size_t remaining_data = adaptor.size();
        std::size_t current_chunk_size = std::min(chunk_size, remaining_data);
        
        std::vector<uint8_t> temp(current_chunk_size);
        adaptor.read(temp.data(), current_chunk_size);
        result.insert(result.end(), temp.begin(), temp.end());
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    // Create a buffer (vector) for the serialized data
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;

    // Create a buffer_adaptor for the buffer, initialized as empty
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer, hexi::init_empty_t{});

    // Create a binary_stream for writing
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);

    // Serialize the message_id
    uint32_t big_message_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.write(big_message_id);

    // Serialize the data_values vector
    // Convert each element to big-endian
    std::vector<uint16_t> big_data_values;
    big_data_values.reserve(packet.data_values.size());
    for (auto value : packet.data_values) {
        big_data_values.push_back(hexi::endian::native_to_big(value));
    }
    stream.write_container(big_data_values);

    // Serialize the checksum
    uint32_t big_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.write(big_checksum);

    return buffer;
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolPacket packet;

    // Create a buffer_adaptor for the buffer, initialized as empty
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer, hexi::init_empty_t{});

    // Create a binary_stream for reading
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);

    // Deserialize the message_id
    uint32_t message_id;
    stream.read(&message_id);
    message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(message_id);
    packet.message_id = message_id;

    // Deserialize the count of data_values
    uint32_t count;
    stream.read(&count);
    count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(count);

    // Deserialize the data_values vector
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    stream.read_container(data_values, count);

    // Convert each element from big-endian to native
    for (auto& value : data_values) {
        value = hexi::endian::big_to_native(value);
    }
    packet.data_values = std::move(data_values);

    // Deserialize the checksum
    uint32_t checksum;
    stream.read(&checksum);
    checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(checksum);
    packet.checksum = checksum;

    return packet;
}

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolHeader header;

    // Create a buffer_adaptor for the buffer, initialized as empty
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer, hexi::init_empty_t{});

    // Create a binary_stream for reading
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);

    // Use span to get the message_id
    auto header_span = stream.span<uint32_t>(1);
    if (!header_span.empty()) {
        header.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(header_span[0]);
    }

    // Use skip to advance past the header (4 bytes)
    // But note: the span function already advanced by 4 bytes, so we skip 0?
    stream.skip(0);

    return header;
}
